title: sweech profile audit: flag dormant + identity cross-bleed, prune

context.text: From runecode RUNECODE_NEEDS_v3.md (S7). AC: 'sweech profile audit' lists profiles, flags zero-thread/zero-history (dormant), flags identity cross-bleed (e.g. profile-name 'kimi' but auth.token belongs to claude), proposes prune. Studio: 7 dormant Claude + 2 dormant Codex profiles found.
Shipped in 6ae65c2. profileAudit.ts: dormant + cross-bleed + orphan-cred + missing-settings + expired-token. --prune writes profile_removed audit log. 80 tests.
